seo.title: Brunch Menu — Weekend Creole Brunch | Louisiana Purchase North Park
seo.description: Louisiana Purchase's weekend Creole brunch menu in North Park, San Diego. Drop Top Chicken Flock, Catfish N' Grits, and Shrimp N' Grits — served Saturday and Sunday from noon.

hero.title: Brunch
hero.subtitle: North Park's most indulgent weekend ritual. Creole brunch plates and craft cocktails from noon — the patio, the music, the afternoon light through the pergola.
